channel.title: Barely Booting Build Log
channel.description: Build log for the NetISA project. Open-source WiFi and TLS 1.3 for vintage ISA PCs.

item.title: TAKEOVER v1.1: Demoscene Enhancement Pack
item.description: Eight demoscene-inspired features: beat-synced visuals, OPL2 stingers, sine wave text distortion, state transitions (dissolve/wipe/fade/glitch), per-AI Mode 13h climax sequences, living status bar, VGA palette cycling, and a hidden cracktro with raster bars, DYCP scroller, starfield, and 9-channel chiptune. 58KB EXE.

item.title: Claude for DOS
item.description: Built CLAUDE.EXE, a Claude AI chat client for DOS with 3-mode agent system (Chat/Ask/Auto), far-heap message pool, word-wrapped rendering, and command execution via [EXEC] tags. Quality-gated with adversarial review.

item.title: Site launch + community pages
item.description: barelybooting.com is live. Project page, build log, RSS feed. The site exists because the project reached a point where a README isn't enough.

item.title: v1 firmware complete
item.description: ESP32-S3 firmware hit production quality after 8 rounds of adversarial review. WiFi manager, HTTP client with 4 concurrent TLS sessions, HTML-to-CP437 parser, embedded web config server, OTA updates.

item.title: Discord client for DOS
item.description: Text-mode Discord client running in DOSBox-X. 6 channels, word-wrapped messages with author colors, compose bar, scrolling. Discord on an 8088.

item.title: Cathode text-mode browser
item.description: Built Cathode, a text-mode HTTPS browser for DOS. Split architecture between DOS and ESP32. Link navigation, URL bar, back/forward history, CP437 box-drawing.

item.title: DOS software stack complete
item.description: Full DOS software stack built and tested. TSR driver, launcher with WiFi scanning, screen library, INT 63h API, stub layer for DOSBox-X testing.

item.title: CPLD verification complete — 160/160 tests passing
item.description: All 160 Verilog testbench tests passing. Address decode, wait states, watchdog, IRQ state machine. Zero bus contention. Lint clean.

item.title: Hardware design finalized, parts ordered
item.description: Schematic and PCB layout finalized. ATF1508AS CPLD, ESP32-S3, Wiznet W5500 pads for v1.5 Ethernet. Parts ordered for prototype build.
